title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built on Kimi K2.5 with 256K context and fine-tuned through continued coding-focused pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning. The model uses reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties and self-summarization to balance speed and depth in code generation tasks.
